description_long: This object is a freestanding kitchen appliance with a rectangular body and a raised control panel at the back. The front features a wide, horizontal handle, likely for opening a large door, and the top surface has four circular impressions, suggesting burner placements. The control panel is equipped with three round dials and a set of three small buttons, all arranged in a row. The exterior is a uniform dark gray color with a matte finish, and the overall design is simple and utilitarian, lacking any visible branding or decorative elements. The sides and back are plain, with no additional features or openings. The appliance appears robust and is likely constructed from metal, suitable for heavy-duty use in an urban environment.
description: A dark gray, freestanding kitchen appliance with a wide front handle, raised control panel, and four burner impressions on top. The design is simple, matte, and utilitarian.
description_view_0: Front view shows a wide handle, large door, and a raised control panel with three dials and three buttons.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the depth of the appliance and the protruding control panel at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view is plain and featureless, showing the flat back surface of the appliance.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, highlighting the appliance's depth and the control panel's profile.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the back of the top surface, featuring three round dials evenly spaced to the right and a group of three small, round buttons to the left. No labels or icons are visible.
attribute_door_handle_style: The door handle is a wide, horizontal bar integrated into the upper section of the front door, slightly protruding and matching the dark gray color of the appliance.
attribute_visible_buttons_or_dials: Three round dials and three small round buttons are visible on the control panel, all in dark gray with no visible labels or icons.
attribute_front_panel_design: The front panel is flat and dark gray with a matte finish, featuring a wide horizontal handle and no decorative elements, seams, windows, or displays.
